title: aster glabriusculus
intro: Aster glabriusculus, also known as Small White Aster, is a flowering plant species native to Europe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The root of the plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Aster glabriusculus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
